addKey: Connect VVDI2/MVP Pro/T-Code Pro to OBD port. Select VAG > Key Learn > 4th IMMO (or 3rd) > choose cluster type. Read PIN+CS from ECU via OBD. Use blank ID48 chip. Make dealer key, then perform key learning with ignition cycles.
allKeysLost: Same as add-key via OBD (IMMO3/non-precoded ID48 supports full OBD AKL). Read PIN+CS from ECU via OBD. Program blank ID48 key. All previous keys become invalid after AKL procedure.
pinSource: OBD read from ECU (auto-read by tool, no manual PIN entry needed for IMMO3)
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left, behind removable cover near left shin
specialTool: VVDI2, MVP Pro, or T-Code Pro with VAG license

addKey: Connect VVDI2 or SuperVAG to OBD port. Select VAG > Key Learn > IMMO4 > select cluster type (VDO NEC+24C64 or similar). Read PIN+CS from ECU via OBD. Use blank ID48 CAN chip with VVDI2 (cannot clone precoded chip). Make dealer key, then key learning.
allKeysLost: IMMO4 AKL requires cluster EEPROM (NEC24C64) service-mode dump OR OBD CAN method depending on cluster variant. OBD CAN method: read PIN+CS from ECU via OBD, activate service mode on cluster, make dealer key, add key. Alternatively remove cluster 24C64 chip, read EEPROM with VVDI Prog, generate service EEPROM, write back, then proceed via OBD.
pinSource: OBD read from ECU via VVDI2/Autel (auto-extracted by tool)
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left, behind removable cover near left shin
specialTool: VVDI2 (VAG IMMO4 license) + OBD Helper cable; or Autel IM608 with XP400; or VVDI Prog for EEPROM dump

addKey: Connect VVDI2 or Autel IM608 to OBD port. Select VAG > Key Learn > IMMO4. Read PIN+CS from ECU via OBD. Use blank ID48 CAN chip or VVDI super chip. Make dealer key, key learning. For NBG010206T (KESSY/proximity) models, remote must also be synced.
allKeysLost: IMMO4 AKL: cluster EEPROM service-mode method preferred. Read NEC+24C64 EEPROM from cluster (remove and read with VVDI Prog, or use Autel IM608 service-mode via OBD). Generate service EEPROM, write back, read IMMO data, make dealer key, add key. OBD CAN method also possible on some cluster types.
pinSource: OBD read from ECU (auto-extracted by tool); EEPROM dump method reads from cluster
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left, behind removable cover
specialTool: VVDI2 + VVDI Prog (for EEPROM); or Autel IM608 + XP400 + G-Box adapter (service mode)

addKey: Connect VVDI2 (with MQB license) or Autel IM608 to OBD port. Select MQB platform. With 1 working key: read CS from immo module via OBD, generate dealer key (online token via VVDI or flat fee via Autel), perform key learning.
allKeysLost: MQB AKL: requires reading CS from all IMMO-participating modules (immo, ECU, TCU, ELV). Autel IM608 via OBD (flat $30/vehicle fee, no module removal). VVDI2 MQB AKL requires sync data obtained online. Abrites AVDI requires bench work (minimal dashboard disassembly, ZN085) + online token.
pinSource: OBD component-security read from IMMO module; online token/sync data for AKL
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left, behind removable cover
specialTool: VVDI2 + MQB48 online license; or Autel IM608 Pro (MQB AKL $30/vehicle); or Abrites AVDI VN009 + online token

addKey: Connect VVDI2 (MQB license) or Autel IM608 Pro to OBD port. Select MQB/A7 platform. With 1 working key: read CS from immo via OBD (16 bytes), online token calculation, make dealer key, key learning via ignition cycles.
allKeysLost: MQB A7 AKL: read CS from all IMMO modules via OBD. Autel IM608 Pro recommended (OBD-only, $30/vehicle flat fee). VVDI2 MQB AKL needs sync data online. All prior keys invalidated after AKL.
pinSource: OBD component-security read from immo/ECU/TCU; online sync data for AKL
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left, behind removable cover
specialTool: Autel IM608 Pro (preferred for AKL, OBD-only); or VVDI2 + MQB AKL online license

addKey: Connect VVDI2 or Autel IM508 to OBD port. Select VAG > Key Learn > IMMO4 > cluster type. Read PIN+CS from ECU via OBD. Use blank ID48 CAN chip or VVDI super chip. Make dealer key, key learning.
allKeysLost: IMMO4 AKL (B6/B7 Passat): OBD CAN method possible — read PIN+CS from ECU, activate cluster service mode, make dealer key. Alternatively remove cluster EEPROM (NEC+24C64 or 9S12 Motorola), bench-read, generate service data, program. Tango/VVDI2/Autel IM608 all confirmed on B6 2007.
pinSource: OBD read from ECU (auto-extracted); or cluster EEPROM dump
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left, behind removable cover
specialTool: VVDI2 (VAG IMMO4 license); or Autel IM608 + XP400; or Tango with VAG module

addKey: Connect VVDI2 (MQB license) or Autel IM608 to OBD port. Select MQB/NMS platform. With 1 working key: read CS from immo via OBD, online token, make dealer key, key learning via OBD.
allKeysLost: MQB/NMS AKL: read CS from all IMMO modules via OBD. Autel IM608/IM508 supports OBD-only AKL ($30/vehicle). Requires 32-byte sync data online if no working key. VVDI2 MQB AKL license available.
pinSource: OBD component-security read; online 32-byte sync data for AKL
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left, behind removable cover
specialTool: Autel IM608 Pro or IM508 + XP400 (MQB AKL, OBD-only); or VVDI2 + MQB AKL online license

addKey: Connect VVDI2 or SuperVAG to OBD port. Select VAG > Key Learn > IMMO4 > cluster type. Read PIN+CS from ECU via OBD. Use blank ID48 CAN chip. Make dealer key, key learning. For NBG010206T (KESSY) models, also sync remote.
allKeysLost: IMMO4 AKL: cluster EEPROM service-mode (NEC+24C64). Read cluster EEPROM via bench or OBD service mode. Generate service data, make dealer key, add key via OBD. Autel IM508/IM608 supports service-mode AKL on this generation.
pinSource: OBD read from ECU; cluster EEPROM dump for AKL
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left, behind removable cover
specialTool: VVDI2 + VVDI Prog; or Autel IM608 + G-Box (service mode AKL)

addKey: Connect VVDI2 (MQB license) or Autel IM608 Pro to OBD port. Select MQB/AD1 platform. With 1 working key: read CS (16 bytes) from immo module via OBD, online token, make dealer key (blank ID88/AES chip), key learning.
allKeysLost: MQB AES AKL: requires 32-byte sync data from all IMMO modules via OBD. Autel IM608 Pro OBD-only ($30/vehicle). VVDI2 + MQB AKL online license. Abrites AVDI with ZN085 bench method (no online dependency).
pinSource: OBD component-security read from immo/ECU/TCU; online sync data for AKL
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left, behind removable cover
specialTool: Autel IM608 Pro (preferred, OBD-only AKL); or VVDI2 + MQB AKL license; or Abrites AVDI VN009

addKey: Connect VVDI2 (MQB license) or Autel IM608 Pro to OBD port. Select MQB platform. With 1 working key: read CS from immo via OBD, online token, make dealer key (blank AES/ID88 chip), key learning. HU162T blade for emergency key.
allKeysLost: MQB AES AKL: read CS from immo + ECU + TCU via OBD. Autel IM608 Pro OBD-only ($30/vehicle fee). VVDI2 MQB AKL online license. Abrites AVDI ZN085 bench method.
pinSource: OBD component-security read; online sync data for AKL
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left, behind removable cover
specialTool: Autel IM608 Pro or VVDI2 + MQB AKL license; or Abrites AVDI VN009

addKey: Connect VVDI2 or Autel IM508 to OBD port. Select VAG > Key Learn > IMMO4 > cluster type. Read PIN+CS from ECU via OBD. Use blank ID48 CAN chip. Make dealer key, key learning.
allKeysLost: IMMO4 AKL (MK6): cluster NEC+24C64 EEPROM service-mode method. Use Autel IM608 with G-Box (service mode via OBD), or remove cluster and bench-read EEPROM with VVDI Prog, generate service EEPROM, write back, then add key via OBD.
pinSource: OBD read from ECU; cluster EEPROM dump for AKL
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left, behind removable cover

addKey: Connect VVDI2 (MQB license) or Autel IM608 to OBD port. Select MQB/MK7 platform. With 1 working key: read CS from immo via OBD, online token, make dealer key (blank ID88 AES chip), key learning.
allKeysLost: MQB AES AKL: read CS from immo + ECU + TCU + ELV via OBD. Autel IM608/IM508 OBD-only ($30/vehicle). VVDI2 MQB AKL online license. Abrites AVDI ZN085 bench (no online token dependency). All previous keys invalidated.
pinSource: OBD component-security read from multiple modules; online 32-byte sync data for AKL
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left, behind removable cover

addKey: Connect Autel IM608 Pro or VVDI2 (MQB license) to OBD port. Select MQB platform. With 1 working key: read CS from immo via OBD, online token, make dealer key (blank AES/ID88 chip), key learning.
allKeysLost: MQB AES AKL: same as Golf MK7 / MQB AES. Read CS from immo + ECU + TCU via OBD. Autel IM608 Pro OBD-only ($30/vehicle). VVDI2 MQB AKL license. All previous keys invalidated.
pinSource: OBD component-security read; online sync data for AKL
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left, behind removable cover
specialTool: Autel IM608 Pro (preferred, OBD-only AKL); or VVDI2 + MQB AKL license

addKey: Connect VVDI2 or Autel IM508 to OBD port. Select VAG > Key Learn > IMMO4 > cluster type. Read PIN+CS from ECU via OBD. Use blank ID48 CAN chip or VVDI super chip. Make dealer key, key learning. NBG010206T (KESSY) models also require remote sync.
allKeysLost: IMMO4 AKL (A5 Beetle): cluster EEPROM service-mode method (NEC+24C64). Bench-read cluster EEPROM or OBD service mode via Autel IM608 + G-Box. Generate service data, make dealer key, add key. VVDI2 service-mode AKL also supported.
pinSource: OBD read from ECU; cluster EEPROM for AKL
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left, behind removable cover
specialTool: VVDI2 + VVDI Prog; or Autel IM508/IM608 + G-Box; SuperVAG

addKey: Connect VVDI2 or OBDSTAR X300 DP to OBD port. Select Touareg IMMO (PCF7945/HITAG). Autodetect login code from ECU via OBD. Enter login code, enter new key number, press Learn, cycle ignition per tool prompts, insert each key and crank until steering lock engages.
allKeysLost: PCF7945AC (Hitag Ext VAG) AKL: use FVDI/AVDI or OBDSTAR X300 DP via OBD. Turn on headlights + brake pedal to force communication. Tool reads KESSY EEPROM via OBD or extracts login from ECU. Program dealer key, key learning. VVDI2 and FVDI both confirmed on 2011-2013 Touareg AKL.
pinSource: OBD/component-security read from ECU or KESSY module (auto-extracted by tool)
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left, behind removable cover
specialTool: VVDI2 (VAG 5th IMMO license); or OBDSTAR X300 DP Plus; or FVDI/Abrites AVDI

addKey: CR7 Touareg (MLB) not sold in US market. For import/reference: KYDZ MLB Tool or Lonsdor K518 Pro. Read original key IDE (bench, QFN64 chip in adapter), calculate dealer key via server, program via OBD. Requires online token calculation.
allKeysLost: MLB AKL (import only): requires ODIS online access or SFD gateway unlock + MLB tool. KYDZ MLB Tool and VVDI MLB Tool only add keys; true AKL requires OEM/dealer ODIS online. Consider referring to dealer for AKL on MLB-platform vehicles.
pinSource: Online token/server calculation from original key IDE; dealer ODIS for AKL
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left (European spec)
specialTool: KYDZ MLB Tool + online token; or Lonsdor K518 Pro; ODIS online for AKL

addKey: Connect VVDI2 or SuperVAG to OBD port. Select VAG > Key Learn > IMMO4 > cluster type (8P A3 uses K-line or CAN). Read PIN+CS from ECU via OBD. Use blank ID48 chip. Make dealer key, key learning.
allKeysLost: IMMO4 AKL (8P A3): cluster EEPROM or OBD CAN method. For K-line models, use VVDI2 + Godiag GT114 K-line adapter. Read cluster EEPROM or ECU PIN+CS via OBD. Make dealer key, add key. All previous keys invalidated.
pinSource: OBD read from ECU (K-line or CAN); cluster EEPROM dump for AKL
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left footwell, near fuse box cover
specialTool: VVDI2 + Godiag GT114 K-line adapter (for K-line clusters); or SuperVAG

addKey: Connect VVDI2 (MQB license) or Autel IM608 to OBD port. Select MQB/8V platform. With 1 working key: select 'MQB platform instrument immobilizer' > NEC35xx. Read CS 16 bytes via OBD, online token, make dealer key, key learning.
allKeysLost: MQB AES AKL (8V A3): select 'All keys lost — need sync data'. VVDI2 MQB AKL requires NEC35xx sync data via online server. Autel IM608 OBD-only ($30/vehicle). Abrites AVDI ZN085 bench method. 2013 A3 AKL confirmed with VVDI2 + VVDI Prog.
pinSource: OBD component-security (16 bytes from immo NEC35xx); online sync data for AKL
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left footwell
specialTool: VVDI2 + VVDI Prog + MQB AKL license; or Autel IM608 Pro; or Abrites AVDI VN009 + ZN085

addKey: Connect VVDI2/MVP Pro/T-Code Pro to OBD port. Select VAG > Key Learn > IMMO3 or IMMO4 (B6 = IMMO3, early B7 = IMMO3/4). Read PIN+CS from ECU via OBD. Use blank (non-precoded) ID48 chip — clonable. Make dealer key, key learning.
allKeysLost: IMMO3 AKL: OBD method — read PIN+CS from ECU, program blank ID48 chip as dealer key. No cluster EEPROM dump needed for IMMO3. VVDI2, MVP Pro, T-Code Pro all supported.
pinSource: OBD read from ECU (auto-extracted)
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left footwell, behind cover near fuse box
specialTool: VVDI2, MVP Pro, or T-Code Pro with VAG license

addKey: Connect VVDI2 to OBD port. Select Audi > Key Learn > 5th IMMO System. Click 'Read BCM Data (OBDII)'. Insert working key to turn on ignition. Save BCM bin file. Click 'Make Dealer Key' — for A4/A5/Q5 no working key needed at this step. Place new key blank in VVDI2 programmer. Click 'Key Learning', set key count, use working key for ignition, insert new key to learn. Alternatively use Autel IM608 + Smart Pro.
allKeysLost: BCM2 AKL (B8 A4): requires bench work. Locate BCM2 in right-rear trunk area. Remove BCM2 plugs, connect VVDI Prog + BCM2 adapter (+12V). Read DATA1 (LOCK_BCM2), load into VVDI2 (internet required). Read DATA2 if prompted. Generate immo + service data. Write service data back to BCM2. Reinstall BCM2. Perform key learning via 5th IMMO OBD.
pinSource: OBD BCM2 data read (auto-extracted by VVDI2); bench BCM2 EEPROM for AKL
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left footwell, behind cover
specialTool: VVDI2 + VVDI Prog + BCM2 adapter (solder-free) + 12V supply; or Autel IM608 Pro + Smart Pro; or Abrites AVDI

addKey: Connect KYDZ MLB Tool or VVDI MLB Tool. Read original key IDE (QFN64 chip in adapter, bench). Calculate dealer key data via online server. Program new key. Connect to OBD port for final key learning. 2017-2018 (IYZAK01, 315 MHz): Lonsdor K518 Pro or KYDZ MLB Tool. 2019+ (IYZ-AK2, 434 MHz): same tools + component protection online token.
allKeysLost: MLB AKL (B9 A4): KYDZ MLB Tool and VVDI MLB Tool are add-key only. True AKL requires ODIS online dealer access OR SFD gateway unlock (half-hour window) then use MLB tool. For 2019+ MLB-Evo: component protection requires online authorization token; bench BCM2 extraction possible with advanced tools.
pinSource: Online server token from original key IDE; dealer ODIS online for AKL
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left footwell, behind cover
specialTool: KYDZ MLB Tool + online token; or VVDI MLB Tool (with VVDI2); or Lonsdor K518 Pro; dealer ODIS for AKL

addKey: Same procedure as A4 B8 (shared BCM2 platform). Connect VVDI2 to OBD port. Select Audi > Key Learn > 5th IMMO. Read BCM Data via OBD with working key. Make dealer key (no working key needed at this step for A4/A5/Q5). Key learning with ignition cycle.
allKeysLost: BCM2 AKL (8T A5): bench work required. Remove BCM2 from trunk right-rear, connect VVDI Prog + BCM2 adapter. Read DATA1/DATA2, generate immo + service data, write back. Reinstall, key learning via OBD. Abrites AVDI also supported.
pinSource: OBD BCM2 data read; bench BCM2 EEPROM for AKL
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left footwell, behind cover
specialTool: VVDI2 + VVDI Prog + BCM2 adapter; or Autel IM608 Pro; or Abrites AVDI

addKey: F5 A5 shares MLB platform with B9 A4. KYDZ MLB Tool or VVDI MLB Tool. Bench-read original key IDE (QFN64 chip), online token calculation, generate dealer key. OBD for final key learning. 2019+ requires component protection online token.
allKeysLost: MLB AKL: add-key tools only. True AKL requires ODIS online or SFD unlock + MLB tool window. Same as B9 A4 AKL procedure.
pinSource: Online server token from original key IDE; dealer ODIS for AKL
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left footwell, behind cover
specialTool: KYDZ MLB Tool; or VVDI MLB Tool + VVDI2; or Lonsdor K518 Pro

addKey: Connect VVDI2 to OBD port. Select Audi A6/Q7/Allroad CAN > Key Learn. Pre-2009 (9S12DT128 J518): Read 6-byte PIN+CS from ECU via OBD, then read full J518 EEPROM via OBD (standard method). Load J518 dump, make dealer key, key learning. Post-2009 (9S12DT256 J518): Read J518 EEPROM dump with working key. Load dump, make dealer key, key learning.
allKeysLost: C6 A6 AKL: Pre-2009 J518 (9S12DT128): OBD standard method — bridge OBD pins 1+16 to force communication, read PIN+CS from ECU, read J518 EEPROM, make dealer key. Post-2009 J518 (9S12DT256): OBD method not supported for AKL — bench extraction of J518 EEPROM required (remove J518/EZS, read 9S12 via programmer like Xprog, make dealer key). Caution: select correct J518 chip type to avoid brick.
pinSource: OBD read from ECU (6 bytes PIN + 6 bytes CS); or J518 EEPROM bench dump
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left footwell, behind cover
specialTool: VVDI2 (VAG IMMO4 CAN license); Xprog or VVDI Prog for J518 bench extraction (post-2009 AKL); or Autel IM608

addKey: C7 A6 (BCM2/IYZFBSB802). Connect VVDI2 to OBD port. Select Audi > Key Learn > 5th IMMO. Read BCM Data via OBD with working key in ignition. Make dealer key (A4/A5/Q5 shortcut applies; for A6/A7/A8, may need working key). Key learning via ignition cycle.
allKeysLost: BCM2 AKL (C7 A6): bench work required. Locate BCM2 in trunk right-rear. Remove BCM2, connect VVDI Prog + solder-free BCM2 adapter (+12V). Read DATA1 (LOCK_BCM2), load to VVDI2 (internet needed). Read DATA2 if prompted. Generate and write service data back. Reinstall, key learning via OBD.
pinSource: OBD BCM2 data read; bench BCM2 EEPROM read for AKL
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left footwell, behind cover
specialTool: VVDI2 + VVDI Prog + BCM2 solder-free adapter + 12V supply; or Abrites AVDI

addKey: C8 A6 (MLB-Evo/IYZ-AK2, 434 MHz). KYDZ MLB Tool or VVDI MLB Tool + VVDI2. Bench-read original key IDE (QFN64 chip in adapter). Online token calculation. Generate dealer key. OBD for key learning. Component protection requires online authorization token.
allKeysLost: MLB-Evo AKL: add-key tools (KYDZ/VVDI MLB) are add-key only. True AKL requires ODIS online dealer access or SFD gateway unlock + MLB tool window. Component protection active — online authorization required.
pinSource: Online token/server calculation from original key IDE; dealer ODIS for AKL
obdPort: Under dashboard, driver side lower left footwell, behind cover
specialTool: KYDZ MLB Tool + online token; or VVDI MLB Tool; or Lonsdor K518 Pro; dealer ODIS for AKL

addKey: 8U Q3 (MQB/IMMO4 ID48 CAN). Connect VVDI2 or Abrites AVDI to OBD port. Select IMMO4 or MQB platform per tool. With 1 working key: read CS/PIN from ECU via OBD. Use blank ID48 CAN chip. Make dealer key, key learning.
allKeysLost: IMMO4 AKL (8U Q3): cluster EEPROM service-mode method. Read NEC+24C64 cluster EEPROM (bench or OBD service mode). Generate service data, make dealer key, add key via OBD. VVDI2 or Autel IM608 supported.

addKey: F3 Q3 (MQB-A/IMMO5 AES). Connect VVDI2 (MQB license) or Autel IM608 to OBD port. Select MQB platform. With 1 working key: read CS (16 bytes) from immo via OBD, online token, make dealer key (blank AES/ID88 chip), key learning.
allKeysLost: MQB AES AKL (F3 Q3): same as MQB Golf/Jetta. Read CS from immo + ECU + TCU + ELV via OBD. Autel IM608 Pro OBD-only ($30/vehicle). VVDI2 MQB AKL license. Abrites AVDI ZN085 bench method.

allKeysLost: BCM2 AKL (8R Q5): bench work required. Remove BCM2 from trunk right-rear. Connect VVDI Prog + solder-free BCM2 adapter. Read DATA1/DATA2, load to VVDI2, generate service data, write back. Reinstall, key learning via OBD.

addKey: FY Q5 (MLB/IYZ-AK2, 434 MHz). KYDZ MLB Tool or VVDI MLB Tool. Bench-read original key IDE (QFN64 chip in adapter), online server token calculation, generate dealer key. OBD for final key learning. 2019+ component protection requires online authorization token.
allKeysLost: MLB AKL (FY Q5): KYDZ and VVDI MLB Tool are add-key only. True AKL requires ODIS online dealer access or SFD gateway unlock + 30-min MLB tool window. Bench BCM2 extraction possible with advanced tools for component protection bypass.

Pre-2009 (J518 9S12DT128): Read PIN+CS from ECU via OBD, read J518 EEPROM via OBD, load dump, make dealer key, key learning. Post-2009 (J518 9S12DT256): Read J518 EEPROM with working key, make dealer key, key learning.

Post-2009 J518 (9S12DT256) — bench-extract J518/EZS EEPROM (remove steering column module, read 9S12 chip with Xprog or VVDI Prog), make dealer key, key learning. addKey: 4M Q7 (MLB/IYZAK01 2016-2018, IYZ-AK2 2019+). KYDZ MLB Tool or VVDI MLB Tool. Bench-read original key IDE (QFN64 chip in adapter), online token calculation, generate dealer key. OBD for final key learning. 2019+ component protection requires online authorization token.
allKeysLost: MLB AKL (4M Q7): KYDZ and VVDI MLB Tool are add-key only. True AKL requires ODIS online dealer access or SFD gateway unlock + 30-min MLB tool window. Same constraint as B9 A4/FY Q5.

allKeysLost: MLB-Evo AKL (Q8): same constraint as A6 C8. KYDZ/VVDI MLB Tool are add-key only. True AKL requires ODIS online dealer access or SFD unlock. 2023+ Q8: aftermarket tools cannot complete key learning — dealer/ODIS only.
